# AyitiMarket

> AyitiMarket se marketplace mobil Ayisyen an: yon plas kote moun an Ayiti
> achte ak vann an tout sekirite. Chak tranzaksyon pwoteje ak yon sistèm
> eskwo sou MonCash — lajan achtè a rete bloke jiskaske li konfime li
> resevwa komann nan ak yon kòd OTP. Vandè yo verifye (ID + selfie).
>
> AyitiMarket is the Haitian mobile marketplace: people in Haiti buy and
> sell safely. Every transaction is protected by MonCash escrow — the
> buyer's money is held until they confirm delivery with an OTP code.
> Sellers are identity-verified.

## Kijan li mache (How it works)

- Achtè jwenn yon pwodwi epi pale ak vandè a nan chat (ak nòt vokal + pataj GPS).
- Achtè peye ak MonCash; lajan an bloke nan eskwo (li pa ale jwenn vandè a toudenkou).
- Nan pwen kolèk la, achtè bay vandè a yon kòd OTP 6 chif pou konfime livrezon.
- Lè livrezon konfime, lajan an libere pou vandè a. Pa gen fwod, pa gen pèt.
- Gen sistèm litij (dispute) si yon bagay pa mache, ak revizyon admin.

## Kategori (Categories)

Elektwonik (telefòn, akseswa), Mòd (rad, soulye), Bote & Kosmetik,
Gaming, Akseswa, Atizana Ayisyen, Kay (dekorasyon), Bebe.

## Vil (Cities served)

Pòtoprens, Pétion-Ville, Delmas, Tabarre, Carrefour, Kwadèbouke (Croix-des-Bouquets),
Cap-Haïtien (Okap), Les Cayes.

## Paj enpòtan (Key pages)

- [Paj dakèy / App](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/): app la an antye (achte, vann, chat, eskwo).
- [Elektwonik an Ayiti](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/l/elektwonik.html)
- [Rad ak Mòd an Ayiti](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/l/mod.html)
- [Bote & Kosmetik an Ayiti](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/l/bote.html)
- [Atizana Ayisyen](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/l/atizana.html)
- [AyitiMarket nan Pòtoprens](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/l/potoprens.html)
- [AyitiMarket nan Cap-Haïtien](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/l/kap-ayisyen.html)
- [Sitemap](https://ayiti-market.vercel.app/sitemap.xml)

## Pwen kle (Key facts)

- Peman: MonCash (Digicel). Lajan pwoteje ak eskwo.
- Lang: Kreyòl ayisyen (interface).
- Sekirite: vandè verifye (ID + selfie), kòd OTP pou livrezon, sistèm litij.
- App mobil (PWA) — ou ka enstale l sou telefòn ou.
